artifact_value: Jane has been using multiple encryption methods to conceal communication: an AES-encrypted README file in Documents, a BitLocker volume named R2D2, and a keys file in Downloads encrypted with GPG/PGP public/private key.
Use of AES encryption to conceal a communication file in Documents | Simultaneous use of asymmetric GPG encryption for another message
Volume with non-standard name (R2D2) instead of a descriptive label | BitLocker applied to a specific volume suggests intent to conceal content
Use of asymmetric encryption for secret communication indicates prior coordination | Multiple cryptographic methods applied suggest deliberate layers of protection
Multiple independent encryption/concealment methods observed: AES, BitLocker, GPG/PGP. Related artifacts: ART-001, ART-002, ART-003
